examples.turn_1: Show top ECM deals in 2025 by tranche size

resolution.re_derive: product-dependent metrics/filters: order size ECM=ALLOCATION -> DCM=AMT; ECM-only filters (IPO, SYNDICATE_ROLE, MEETING_TYPE) -> do NOT run a knowably-empty query, explain and offer the DCM equivalent; single-DEAL_ID context -> pivot to the issuer's other deals via GFCID

examples.turn_1: Top investors by allocation for this issuer last year

change.bnd_state: negate B&D condition (filter modifier, not an entity)

interpretation_rules: same / same period / same scope => inherit previous filters by default; follow-ups never re-run entity_search for an already-resolved entity
that issuer / this investor / it / them => bind to most recent confirmed entity + time window
break by X => keep population constant, change grouping dimension
top N => preserve scope and entity filters; adjust ordering and row limit
product flip => re-derive product-dependent column mappings and short-circuit product-exclusive filters (see re_derive example)
